caption: A man with a tattoo on his right arm is recording audio in a studio with dark grey acoustic foam paneling on the wall. He wears a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap, and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a black shock mount and boom arm, which bears the text "Mackie MixRider 304A". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking into the microphone, his mouth open and facial expression shifting slightly as he talks. His posture remains relatively consistent, though there is subtle movement in his head and jaw as he articulates his words. The lighting is dim and focused, highlighting the man against the textured background of the sound-treated room.
